output.code:
# Let's open the uploaded file and load its content
path = "/mnt/data/file-4mkguQ1Dxa4BVex9KXWSPQ-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
len(raw), raw[:500]

import re, json

text = raw

phrases = [
    "وَمَنْ أَصْدَقُ مِنَ اللَّهِ حَدِيثًا",
    "إِنَّ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ أُولَٰئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ الْبَرِيَّةِ",
    "المؤمن من سلم المسلمون من لسانه ويده",
    "المؤمن الذي يخالط الناس ويصبر على أذاهم أفضل من المؤمن الذي لا يخالط الناس ولا يصبر على أذاهم",
    "كَمَنْ هُوَ أعمى",
    "وَمَا أَنتَ بِمُؤْمِنٍ لِّنَا",
    "شَهِدَ اللهُ أَنَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ وَالْمَلاَئِكَةُ وَأُوْلُواْ الْعِلْمِ قَآئِمَاً بِالْقِسْطِ",
]

# find all occurrences for each phrase
occurrences = []
for phrase in phrases:
    start = 0
    while True:
        idx = text.find(phrase, start)
        if idx == -1:
            break
        end = idx + len(phrase)
        # verify exact match
        assert text[idx:end] == phrase
        occurrences.append((phrase, idx, end))
        start = end  # continue searching after this occurrence

occurrences, len(occurrences)

# let's locate all '﴿' segments to see if any other inside references
[(m.start(), m.group()) for m in re.finditer("﴿", text)]
[(m.start(), text[m.start()-50:m.start()+50]) for m in re.finditer("وقال الله", text)]

import json
json_out = json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
json_out
